name: authman
tagline: A lightweight identity service for managing users and single sign-on
description: AuthMan is a lightweight identity management service that offers user provisioning, login, and SSO features. It is built for self-hosting and includes API endpoints and minimal web UI for administration.

features.title: Lightweight
features.description: Lightweight user provisioning and management. Simple IAM

features.title: User Provisioning
features.description: Create and manage user accounts centrally. Streamlined administration

features.title: User Management
features.description: Minimal UI for user management. Clean interface

features.title: Login Service
features.description: Centralized authentication for apps. Consistent security

features.title: Self-Hosted
features.description: Run your own identity service. Complete control
